content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic Daily Update (Apr 9, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on resolving critical compatibility issues for Opus 4.x within the Anthropic plugin. Key updates include migrating to ai-sdk v6 parameter naming conventions and adjusting temperature and output settings to restore functionality.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Opus 4.x Compatibility and ai-sdk v6 Migration
*   Resolved critical bugs preventing Opus 4.x from functioning by updating parameter handling to align with ai-sdk v6 requirements.
*   Renamed `maxTokens` to `maxOutputTokens` to ensure proper configuration, as the previous parameter was being silently ignored.
*   Adjusted temperature settings to 1 and implemented output caps to stabilize model performance ([#15](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/15)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#16](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-anthropic/pull/16): fix: cast emitEvent payload for EventPayloadMap compat.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
